<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ko">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>한우리행정사사무소 | 출입국·체류·사증 전문 행정사</title>
<meta name="description" content="한우리행정사사무소는 출입국·체류자격·사증 관련 업무를 전문적으로 처리하는 행정사사무소입니다. 체류자격 연장, 변경, 외국인등록, 귀화 등 출입국 민원 전반을 체계적으로 진행합니다.">
<meta property="og:title" content="한우리행정사사무소 | 출입국·체류·사증 전문">
<meta property="og:description" content="출입국·체류자격·사증 관련 업무를 전문적으로 처리하는 행정사사무소">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:url" content="https://www.hanwory.com">
<meta property="og:locale" content="ko_KR">
<link rel="canonical" href="https://www.hanwory.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Sans+KR:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Noto+Serif+KR:wght@500;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "ProfessionalService",
  "name": "한우리행정사사무소",
  "description": "출입국·체류자격·사증 관련 업무를 전문적으로 처리하는 행정사사무소",
  "url": "https://www.hanwory.com",
  "telephone": "031-488-8862",
  "address": {
    "@type": "PostalAddress",
    "addressLocality": "시흥시",
    "addressRegion": "경기도",
    "addressCountry": "KR"
  },
  "serviceType": ["체류자격 연장", "체류자격 변경", "외국인등록", "사증 발급", "국적·귀화", "출입국 민원 대행"],
  "areaServed": "KR",
  "availableLanguage": ["ko", "zh"]
}
</script>

<style>
  :root {
    --gold-50: #FFFDF5;
    --gold-100: #FFF9E6;
    --gold-200: #FFF0C2;
    --gold-300: #FFE299;
    --gold-400: #D4A843;
    --gold-500: #B8922E;
    --gold-600: #96751E;
    --gold-700: #6B5314;
    --brand-wine: #8B2252;
    --text-primary: #1A1A1A;
    --text-secondary: #4A4A4A;
    --text-muted: #7A7A7A;
    --bg-white: #FFFFFF;
    --bg-warm: #FEFCF7;
    --bg-section: #FBF9F3;
    --border-light: #F0EDE4;
    --border-gold: #E8DFC8;
    --shadow-sm: 0 1px 3px rgba(180,160,120,0.08);
    --shadow-md: 0 4px 16px rgba(180,160,120,0.10);
    --shadow-lg: 0 8px 32px rgba(180,160,120,0.12);
    --radius: 12px;
    --radius-sm: 8px;
  }
  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; font-size: 16px; }
  body {
    font-family: 'Noto Sans KR', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
    color: var(--text-primary);
    background: var(--bg-white);
    line-height: 1.7;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
  }

  /* ── NAV ── */
  .nav {
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 100;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.95);
    backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-light);
    transition: box-shadow 0.3s;
  }
  .nav.scrolled { box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); }
  .nav-inner {
    max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 24px;
    height: 68px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
  }
  .nav-logo {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
    text-decoration: none;
  }
  .nav-logo img {
    height: 42px; width: auto;
  }
  .nav-logo-text {
    font-family: 'Noto Serif KR', serif;
    font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--text-primary);
    letter-spacing: -0.02em;
    line-height: 1.3;
  }
  .nav-logo-text span { color: var(--gold-500); font-size: 0.78rem; display: block; font-weight: 500; }
  .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 26px; align-items: center; }
  .nav-links a {
    font-size: 0.86rem; font-weight: 500;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--gold-500); }
  .nav-login {
    font-size: 0.82rem !important;
    color: var(--gold-600) !important;
    border: 1.5px solid var(--gold-400);
    padding: 6px 16px;
    border-radius: 6px;
    transition: all 0.2s !important;
  }
  .nav-login:hover {
    background: var(--gold-400) !important;
    color: #fff !important;
  }
  .nav-mobile-toggle {
    display: none; background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer;
    width: 32px; height: 32px; position: relative;
  }
  .nav-mobile-toggle span {
    display: block; width: 20px; height: 2px;
    background: var(--text-primary);
    position: absolute; left: 6px;
    transition: all 0.3s;
  }
  .nav-mobile-toggle span:nth-child(1) { top: 10px; }
  .nav-mobile-toggle span:nth-child(2) { top: 16px; }
  .nav-mobile-toggle span:nth-child(3) { top: 22px; }

  /* ── HERO ── */
  .hero {
    padding: 150px 24px 90px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--gold-50) 0%, var(--bg-white) 100%);
    text-align: center;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .hero::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
    background: radial-gradient(ellipse 600px 400px at 50% 20%, rgba(212,168,67,0.06) 0%, transparent 70%);
    pointer-events: none;
  }
  .hero-logo {
    width: 90px; height: auto;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 8px rgba(180,160,120,0.15));
  }
  .hero-badge {
    display: inline-block;
    font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 500;
    color: var(--gold-600);
    background: var(--gold-100);
    border: 1px solid var(--gold-200);
    padding: 5px 14px;
    border-radius: 20px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
    letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  }
  .hero h1 {
    font-family: 'Noto Serif KR', serif;
    font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 700;
    line-height: 1.35;
    letter-spacing: -0.03em;
    color: var(--text-primary);
    margin-bottom: 18px;
  }
  .hero h1 em {
    font-style: normal;
    color: var(--gold-500);
  }
  .hero-sub {
    font-size: 1.02rem;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    max-width: 540px;
    margin: 0 auto 36px;
    line-height: 1.8;
  }
  .hero-buttons { display: flex; gap: 14px; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .btn-primary {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
    padding: 14px 30px;
    background: var(--gold-400);
    color: #fff;
    font-size: 0.93rem; font-weight: 600;
    border: none; border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(212,168,67,0.25);
    font-family: inherit;
  }
  .btn-primary:hover { background: var(--gold-500); transform: translateY(-1px); }
  .btn-secondary {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
    padding: 14px 30px;
    background: var(--bg-white);
    color: var(--text-primary);
    font-size: 0.93rem; font-weight: 500;
    border: 1.5px solid var(--border-gold);
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    font-family: inherit;
  }
  .btn-secondary:hover { border-color: var(--gold-400); color: var(--gold-600); }

  /* ── SECTION COMMON ── */
  section { padding: 88px 24px; }
  .section-alt { background: var(--bg-section); }
  .container { max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; }
  .section-label {
    font-size: 0.76rem; font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--gold-500);
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }
  .section-title {
    font-family: 'Noto Serif KR', serif;
    font-size: 1.75rem; font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: -0.02em;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    line-height: 1.4;
  }
  .section-desc {
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    max-width: 580px;
    line-height: 1.8;
    margin-bottom: 44px;
  }

  /* ── ABOUT ── */
  .about-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 48px;
    align-items: center;
  }
  .about-text .section-desc { margin-bottom: 24px; }
  .about-highlights {
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px;
  }
  .about-highlight {
    display: flex; gap: 14px; align-items: flex-start;
  }
  .about-highlight-icon {
    flex-shrink: 0;
    width: 36px; height: 36px;
    background: var(--gold-100);
    border: 1px solid var(--gold-200);
    border-radius: 8px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1rem;
  }
  .about-highlight h4 {
    font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 3px;
  }
  .about-highlight p {
    font-size: 0.84rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    line-height: 1.6;
  }
  .about-visual {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold-50), var(--gold-100));
    border: 1px solid var(--border-gold);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    padding: 44px 32px;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .about-visual-logo {
    width: 80px; height: auto;
    margin-bottom: 18px;
  }
  .about-visual h3 {
    font-family: 'Noto Serif KR', serif;
    font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    color: var(--gold-700);
  }
  .about-visual p {
    font-size: 0.86rem;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    line-height: 1.7;
  }

  /* ── SERVICES ── */
  .services-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 20px;
  }
  .service-card {
    background: var(--bg-white);
    border: 1px solid var(--border-light);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    padding: 30px 26px;
    transition: all 0.25s;
  }
  .service-card:hover {
    border-color: var(--gold-300);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
    transform: translateY(-2px);
  }
  .service-icon {
    width: 42px; height: 42px;
    background: var(--gold-100);
    border-radius: 10px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1.15rem;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }
  .service-card h3 {
    font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }
  .service-card p {
    font-size: 0.84rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    line-height: 1.7;
  }

  /* ── STRENGTHS ── */
  .strengths-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    gap: 20px;
  }
  .strength-item {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 32px 18px;
    background: var(--bg-white);
    border: 1px solid var(--border-light);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    transition: all 0.25s;
  }
  .strength-item:hover {
    border-color: var(--gold-300);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
  }
  .strength-num {
    font-family: 'Noto Serif KR', serif;
    font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--gold-400);
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }
  .strength-item h4 {
    font-size: 0.93rem; font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }
  .strength-item p {
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  /* ── PROCESS ── */
  .process-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    gap: 20px;
  }
  .process-step {
    padding: 26px 22px;
    background: var(--bg-white);
    border: 1px solid var(--border-light);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
  }
  .process-step-num {
    font-family: 'Noto Serif KR', serif;
    font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--gold-500);
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  }
  .process-step h4 {
    font-size: 0.93rem; font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }
  .process-step p {
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  /* ── BOARD / 게시판 ── */
  .board-tabs {
    display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 24px;
  }
  .board-tab {
    padding: 8px 20px;
    font-size: 0.86rem; font-weight: 500;
    border: 1.5px solid var(--border-light);
    border-radius: 6px;
    background: var(--bg-white);
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    font-family: inherit;
  }
  .board-tab.active {
    background: var(--gold-400);
    color: #fff;
    border-color: var(--gold-400);
  }
  .board-tab:hover:not(.active) {
    border-color: var(--gold-300);
    color: var(--gold-600);
  }
  .board-list {
    display: flex; flex-direction: column;
  }
  .board-item {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: auto 1fr auto;
    gap: 16px;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 18px 20px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-light);
    transition: background 0.15s;
  }
  .board-item:first-child {
    border-top: 2px solid var(--gold-400);
  }
  .board-item:hover {
    background: var(--gold-50);
  }
  .board-category {
    font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--gold-600);
    background: var(--gold-100);
    padding: 3px 10px;
    border-radius: 4px;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .board-title {
    font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 500;
    color: var(--text-primary);
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .board-title:hover { color: var(--gold-500); }
  .board-date {
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .board-empty {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 60px 20px;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    font-size: 0.9rem;
  }

  /* ── FAQ ── */
  .faq-list {
    max-width: 720px;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px;
  }
  .faq-item {
    border: 1px solid var(--border-light);
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--bg-white);
    transition: border-color 0.2s;
  }
  .faq-item:hover { border-color: var(--gold-300); }
  .faq-question {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 18px 22px;
    background: none; border: none;
    text-align: left;
    font-size: 0.93rem; font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--text-primary);
    cursor: pointer;
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
    font-family: inherit;
  }
  .faq-question::after {
    content: '+';
    font-size: 1.2rem;
    color: var(--gold-400);
    font-weight: 400;
    transition: transform 0.2s;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    margin-left: 12px;
  }
  .faq-item.open .faq-question::after { content: '−'; }
  .faq-answer {
    display: none;
    padding: 0 22px 18px;
    font-size: 0.86rem;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    line-height: 1.8;
  }
  .faq-item.open .faq-answer { display: block; }

  /* ── CTA ── */
  .cta-section {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold-50) 0%, var(--gold-100) 100%);
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border-gold);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-gold);
    text-align: center;
  }
  .cta-section .section-title { margin-bottom: 12px; }
  .cta-section .section-desc {
    margin: 0 auto 32px;
    max-width: 480px;
  }
  .cta-info {
    display: flex; gap: 40px; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap;
    margin-top: 32px;
  }
  .cta-info-item { text-align: center; }
  .cta-info-label {
    font-size: 0.74rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    margin-bottom: 4px;
    font-weight: 500;
  }
  .cta-info-value {
    font-size: 0.93rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--text-primary);
  }

  /* ── FOOTER ── */
  footer {
    background: #1A1A1A;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
    padding: 52px 24px 32px;
  }
  .footer-inner {
    max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 40px;
  }
  .footer-brand-area {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
  }
  .footer-brand-area img { height: 32px; width: auto; }
  .footer-brand {
    font-family: 'Noto Serif KR', serif;
    font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9);
  }
  .footer-brand span { color: var(--gold-400); }
  .footer-desc {
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    line-height: 1.7;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }
  .footer-col h4 {
    font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8);
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  }
  .footer-col a {
    display: block;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
    text-decoration: none;
    margin-bottom: 9px;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }
  .footer-col a:hover { color: var(--gold-400); }
  .footer-bottom {
    max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    padding-top: 20px;
    margin-top: 36px;
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
    font-size: 0.73rem;
  }

  /* ── MOBILE MENU ── */
  .mobile-menu {
    display: none;
    position: fixed; top: 68px; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.98);
    backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
    z-index: 99;
    padding: 28px 24px;
  }
  .mobile-menu.open { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; }
  .mobile-menu a {
    font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500;
    color: var(--text-primary);
    text-decoration: none;
    padding: 12px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-light);
  }

  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    .nav-mobile-toggle { display: block; }
    .hero { padding: 125px 20px 65px; }
    .hero h1 { font-size: 1.75rem; }
    .hero-sub { font-size: 0.9rem; }
    .hero-logo { width: 70px; }
    section { padding: 60px 20px; }
    .section-title { font-size: 1.4rem; }
    .about-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 28px; }
    .about-visual { order: -1; }
    .services-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .strengths-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .process-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .board-item { grid-template-columns: 1fr auto; gap: 8px; }
    .board-category { display: none; }
    .footer-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 24px; }
    .footer-bottom { flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; text-align: center; }
    .cta-info { gap: 20px; }
    .board-tabs { flex-wrap: wrap; }
  }

  .fade-in {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(16px);
    transition: opacity 0.5s ease, transform 0.5s ease;
  }
  .fade-in.visible {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav class="nav" id="nav" role="navigation" aria-label="메인 내비게이션">
  <div class="nav-inner">
    <a href="#" class="nav-logo">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="한우리행정사사무소 로고">
      <div class="nav-logo-text">한우리행정사사무소<span>출입국·체류·사증 전문</span></div>
    </a>
    <div class="nav-links">
      <a href="#about">사무소 소개</a>
      <a href="#services">업무 분야</a>
      <a href="#board">업무 안내</a>
      <a href="#faq">FAQ</a>
      <a href="#contact">상담 문의</a>
      <a href="/login" class="nav-login">로그인 →</a>
    </div>
    <button class="nav-mobile-toggle" id="menuToggle" aria-label="메뉴 열기">
      <span></span><span></span><span></span>
    </button>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section id="about" class="section-alt" aria-labelledby="about-title">
  <div class="container">

        <p class="section-desc">
          한우리행정사사무소는 외국인의 체류자격, 사증, 국적 관련 업무를
          전문적으로 다루는 행정사사무소입니다.
          단순 서류 대행이 아니라, 출입국관리법에 기반한 절차 이해와
          정확한 서류 검토, 일정 관리까지 체계적으로 진행합니다.
        </p>
        <div class="about-highlights">

            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="about-highlight">
            <div class="about-highlight-icon">🌐</div>
            <div>
              <h4>중국어 상담 가능</h4>

            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="about-highlight">
            <div class="about-highlight-icon">⚙️</div>
            <div>
              <h4>디지털 업무 프로세스</h4>
              <p>자체 업무관리 시스템을 활용한 체계적 진행과 누락 방지</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

<!-- SERVICES -->
<section id="services" aria-labelledby="services-title">

      </article>

      </article>
      <article class="service-card fade-in">

      </article>

<!-- PROCESS -->
<section id="process" aria-labelledby="process-title">
  <div class="container">
    <p class="section-label fade-in">Process</p>

    <p class="section-desc fade-in">상담부터 완료까지 체계적인 절차로 진행합니다.</p>
    <div class="process-grid">
      <div class="process-step fade-in">
        <div class="process-step-num">STEP 01</div>
        <h4>상담 및 요건 확인</h4>
        <p>의뢰인의 체류 상황과 목적을 파악하고, 필요한 절차와 요건을 안내합니다.</p>
      </div>

      </div>
      <div class="process-step fade-in">
        <div class="process-step-num">STEP 03</div>
        <h4>접수 및 진행 관리</h4>
        <p>접수 후 진행 상황을 관리하고, 추가 요청이나 보완 사항에 대응합니다.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="process-step fade-in">
        <div class="process-step-num">STEP 04</div>
        <h4>결과 확인 및 안내</h4>
        <p>결과를 확인하고 의뢰인에게 안내합니다. 후속 조치가 필요한 경우 함께 안내합니다.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FAQ -->
<section id="faq" aria-labelledby="faq-title">
  <div class="container">
    <p class="section-label fade-in">FAQ</p>
    <h2 class="section-title fade-in" id="faq-title">자주 묻는 질문</h2>
    <p class="section-desc fade-in">업무 의뢰 전 자주 문의하시는 내용을 정리했습니다.</p>
    <div class="faq-list">
      <div class="faq-item fade-in">
        <button class="faq-question" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">어떤 업무를 상담할 수 있나요?</button>
        <div class="faq-answer">체류자격 연장·변경, 외국인등록, 사증(비자) 발급, 국적·귀화 등 출입국관리법 관련 민원 업무 전반에 대해 상담 가능합니다.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="faq-item fade-in">
        <button class="faq-question" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">방문 전에 무엇을 준비해야 하나요?</button>
        <div class="faq-answer">여권, 외국인등록증 사본, 현재 체류자격 관련 서류를 준비해 주시면 상담이 원활합니다. 구체적인 준비 서류는 전화 상담 시 안내해 드립니다.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="faq-item fade-in">
        <button class="faq-question" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">비용은 어떻게 되나요?</button>
        <div class="faq-answer">업무 종류와 난이도에 따라 다르므로, 상담 시 구체적인 비용을 안내해 드립니다. 상담 자체는 부담 없이 문의해 주시면 됩니다.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="faq-item fade-in">
        <button class="faq-question" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">중국어 상담도 가능한가요?</button>
        <div class="faq-answer">네, 중국어 의사소통이 가능합니다. 중국 국적 의뢰인도 편하게 상담받으실 수 있습니다.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="faq-item fade-in">
        <button class="faq-question" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">기존에 업무를 의뢰한 경우 어떻게 확인하나요?</button>
        <div class="faq-answer">기존 의뢰인은 상단의 '로그인' 버튼을 통해 업무 관리 시스템에 접속하여 진행 상황을 확인하실 수 있습니다.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<script>
// Nav scroll
const nav = document.getElementById('nav');
window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
  nav.classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > 10);
});

// Mobile menu
const menuToggle = document.getElementById('menuToggle');
const mobileMenu = document.getElementById('mobileMenu');
menuToggle.addEventListener('click', () => {
  mobileMenu.classList.toggle('open');
});
function closeMenu() {
  mobileMenu.classList.remove('open');
}

// FAQ toggle
function toggleFaq(btn) {
  const item = btn.parentElement;
  const wasOpen = item.classList.contains('open');
  document.querySelectorAll('.faq-item').forEach(i => i.classList.remove('open'));
  if (!wasOpen) item.classList.add('open');
}

// Board filter
function filterBoard(category, btn) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.board-tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  const items = document.querySelectorAll('.board-item');
  items.forEach(item => {
    if (category === 'all' || item.dataset.category === category) {
      item.style.display = '';
    } else {
      item.style.display = 'none';
    }
  });
}

// Fade in
const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
  entries.forEach(entry => {
    if (entry.isIntersecting) {
      entry.target.classList.add('visible');
    }
  });
}, { threshold: 0.1, rootMargin: '0px 0px -40px 0px' });
document.querySelectorAll('.fade-in').forEach(el => observer.observe(el));
</script>

</body>
</html>
